checks.name: evidence_chain_grounding
checks.description: Design references actual fields from ConsequenceCompiler.js (evidence_refs, source_signal_ids, derivation_trace, evidence_summary, source_condition_types)

checks.name: mapping_table_accuracy
checks.description: §4 condition→consequence mapping table matches actual mapDPC/mapDCkP/mapPA/mapSMC/mapCDCP/mapGCS/mapCC functions

checks.name: combination_table_accuracy
checks.description: §5.2 combination patterns match actual detectCombinations() logic (AMPLIFIED_DEP_FRAG, STRUCT_GRAVITY_WELL, SYSTEMIC_OP_FRAG)

checks.name: no_interpretation
checks.description: Design specifies pure structural verification — no interpretation, no AI, no semantic inference

checks.name: operator_boundary_clear
checks.description: OPERATOR vs INVESTIGATION distinction is explicit — inspection vs verification, high agency vs low agency

checks.name: no_implementation
checks.description: Stream produces design document only — no code, no UI, no runtime changes

checks.name: replay_contract_scoped
checks.description: Replay verifies compiler only (conditions→consequences), not SSE (signals→conditions) — correctly scoped

checks.name: existing_persona_untouched
checks.description: Design does not modify BOARDROOM, BALANCED, DENSE, or OPERATOR behavior

checks.name: sqo_integration_identified
checks.description: Replay MATCH identified as SQO qualification gate — not overspecified, relationship stated
